text:
Author: crees
Date: Sat May  4 14:56:12 2013
New Revision: 317324
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/317324

Log:
  audio/xwave: Fix typo
  
  PR:		ports/175986
  Submitted by:	Christoph Mallon <christoph.mallon@gmx.de>
  Approved by:	maintainer

Modified:
  head/audio/xwave/pkg-message

Modified: head/audio/xwave/pkg-message
==============================================================================
--- head/audio/xwave/pkg-message	Sat May  4 14:46:56 2013	(r317323)
+++ head/audio/xwave/pkg-message	Sat May  4 14:56:12 2013	(r317324)
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-If you run out of space for the temporary files, set the X ressource
+If you run out of space for the temporary files, set the X resource
 XWave*tdir (either in /usr/X11R6/lib/X11/app-defaults/XWave or your
 ~/.Xdefaults) to a suitable directory.
